financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: The company sold more products than ever before, which is a great sign of success.
Even though costs went up, the company expects to grow more by selling new models and exporting more cars next year.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Well Managed
bullets: The company is handling risks well, but rising steel prices are making it more expensive to produce their products.
A new plant is costing more money now, but it should help the company make more in the future once it's fully running.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Good
bullets: The company is doing well in taking care of the environment.
There is room for improvement in how the company is managed and run.

speaker_sentiment.title: Speaker Sentiment
speaker_sentiment.label: Average
bullets: The company leaders talked about both their successes and the challenges they face.
They seemed confident but also aware of the difficulties ahead, keeping a balanced perspective.

qa_transparency.title: Q&A Transparency
qa_transparency.label: Very Poor
bullets: The company gave some numbers about costs but didn't clearly explain their future plans.
They admitted to having problems but didn't share how they plan to fix them.

overall_sentiment.title: Overall Sentiment
overall_sentiment.label: Good
bullets: The company is doing well with record sales, but there are some concerns about local demand and profits.
They plan to grow by selling more overseas and introducing new products, which could lead to future success.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Good
bullets: Maruti Suzuki is doing well with strong sales and new car models, making it a good choice to buy.
However, rising costs and slow market growth could make it harder for the company to make more money.
